testcase.name: test_includes_market_score_and_campaigns

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'acos_equilibrio': None, 'book_economy': {'precio_libro': 0.0, 'regalias_por_venta': 0.0}, 'guias_fase': {'beneficio': None, 'dominio': None, 'lanzamiento': None}, 'key': 'customer_search_term', ...}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter9.py:214: in test_includes_market_score_and_campaigns assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'acos_equilibrio': None, 'book_economy': {'precio_libro': 0.0, 'regalias_por_venta': 0.0}, 'guias_fase': {'beneficio': None, 'dominio': None, 'lanzamiento': None}, 'key': 'customer_search_term', ...}, list)

testcase.name: test_market_score_changes_with_criteria

failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter9.py:228: in test_market_score_changes_with_criteria base_scores = [round(x["market_score"]) for x in r1] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter9.py:228: in <listcomp> base_scores = [round(x["market_score"]) for x in r1] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'
